rawContent.message: No previous snapshot found — first QA run for this revision

contentComparison.reason: First snapshot — full QA run performed

build.detail: bun run build succeeds. No TypeScript compilation errors.

lint.detail: Lint errors exist in other blocks (FullWidthMedia, MainWrapper, TestimonialsCarousel) — none are in Archive. Archive.tsx has 2 pre-existing warnings for react-hooks/exhaustive-deps (lines 81, 104) that were present before this revision.

registration.detail: block.json: apiVersion 3, name takt/archive, all required fields present. presetFilters attribute correctly defined as type:object, default:{}. All file references valid.

attributes.detail: All 13 attributes verified in block.json with correct types and defaults. New presetFilters attribute (type:object, default:{}) is present. Attribute persistence confirmed via test page instances.

edgeCases.detail: All edge case variations render correctly.
verified: Long heading (175+ chars) wraps without overflow — confirmed via NO_OVERFLOW check and page audit
Long description (400+ chars) wraps without breaking layout
Long button label renders without overflow
Empty optional fields (no heading/eyebrow/description/buttons) — block renders only filter bar and grid; heading tag detected from first post card title as expected, not from block attributes
Empty optional fields — ariaAttributes null on section is correct (ThemeHeading does not emit aria-labelledby when heading attribute is empty)
Single column (maxColumns=1) renders 3 cards stacked vertically
Testimonials archive (no taxonomies, no filters, no search) renders correctly with 0 links

interactiveBehavior.detail: JavaScript filter behavior verified via code review and DOM inspection.
verified: Filter select change: adds value to hidden input, calls updateState, builds active pills
Clear All in form: resets hidden inputs and search, calls updateState
Remove pill in active filters bar: removes specific value from hidden input, calls updateState
Load More button: uses data-next-page and data-max-pages, fetches next page and appends cards — confirmed active on section 13 (Single Column, postsPerPage=3)
Pagination link interception: intercepts .pagination a clicks, loads via AJAX
popstate (browser back/forward): calls loadFiltersFromUrl then loadResults
Keyboard filter pills: Enter/Space activate click via handleFilterPillKeyboard
Preset filter initialization: buildButtons() called on page load to populate pills from pre-set hidden inputs

accessibility.detail: Core accessibility patterns verified via page audit.
accessibility.patternComplianceReason: No block-type accessibility patterns registered for archive block type (no QA plan block types defined)
verified: Filter form has role=search (when displaySearch=true) or role=form, with aria-label='Archive filters'
Loading spinner has role=status with aria-label='Loading results'
Results container has role=region, aria-live=polite, aria-label='Archive results', tabindex=-1
Pagination nav has aria-label='Pagination'
Per-page select has aria-label='Items per page'
Clear All button has aria-label='Clear all filters'
Search submit button has aria-label='Search'
All images have meaningful alt text
Heading hierarchy: h2 used for block headings, proper nesting
No JavaScript console errors on page load (automated check passed)
notes: Section with empty heading attributes (index 11) correctly omits aria-labelledby — ThemeHeading only emits it when a heading attribute is set. This is correct behavior.

markupDuplication.detail: No duplicated markup found. No CSS visibility switching between desktop/mobile duplicates. Block uses a single responsive grid column system.

tsxPhpSync.detail: TSX/PHP sync verified. Automated validator warning about root wrapper mismatch (TSX uses <BlockControls> vs PHP <section>) is a false positive — BlockControls is rendered outside the section as editor-only UI, the actual section wrapper matches in both.

syncChecks.wrapperClasses: pass — archive py-gap-8 dark bg-transparent! match TSX cn() and PHP theme_block_props()
syncChecks.containerStructure: pass — container > inner grid > ThemeHeading + archive-inner match
syncChecks.conditionalRendering: pass — all conditionals align between TSX (FilteredServerSideRender renders archive-inner) and PHP
syncChecks.dataAttributes: pass — data-pagination-mode, data-post-type, data-dark-mode, data-preset-filters all output consistently

requirements.requirement: presetFilters attribute added to block.json as type:object with default:{}
PHP applies preset filters to WP_Query — URL params override presets, presets apply when no URL params exist
requirements.evidence: Archive.php lines 118-132: URL values checked first, preset_filters used as fallback. Section 14 (presetFilters={audience:[students]}) returns 1 result (students-only resource) confirming filter application.

requirements.requirement: Active filter pill bar suppressed when displayFilters=false even if presetFilters are active
requirements.evidence: Section 15 (displayFilters=false, presetFilters={audience:[students]}): activeFiltersBar=false, filterForm=false. Correct — no filter UI shown but query is still filtered (1 result).

requirements.requirement: data-preset-filters JSON output on section element for JS consumption
requirements.evidence: Section 14: data-preset-filters='{"audience":["students"]}'. Section 15: data-preset-filters='{"audience":["students"]}'. Sections with empty presetFilters: data-preset-filters='[]' (empty array from wp_json_encode of empty array).

requirements.requirement: JS initializes filter pills from PHP pre-populated hidden inputs on page load
requirements.evidence: Archive.js lines 339-344: buildButtons() called on DOMContentLoaded when form exists. PHP pre-populates hidden input values (line 253) for preset filter slugs. Section 14 shows data-field=audience, data-value=students active pills in innerDataAttributes.

requirements.requirement: Clear All resets to empty (not back to presets)
requirements.evidence: Archive.js form click handler (lines 219-226): resets all hidden inputs to empty string and clears search. Does not re-apply presetFilters. Correct per design decision.

requirements.requirement: loadFiltersFromUrl falls back to presets when no URL params exist (for popstate)
requirements.evidence: Archive.js lines 308-336: loadFiltersFromUrl checks URL params first, falls back to presetFilters[type] when URL has no value for that taxonomy.

requirements.requirement: presetFilters cleared when blockVariation changes in editor
requirements.evidence: Archive.tsx lines 75-81: useRef + useEffect detects blockVariation change and calls setAttributes({ presetFilters: {} })

requirements.requirement: FormTokenField editor UI in Preset Filters PanelBody
requirements.evidence: Archive.tsx lines 232-259: PanelBody with FormTokenField per taxonomy, loads terms via useSelect, maps names<->slugs for storage

issues.description: Archive.tsx has two pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings. Line 81: useEffect for clearing presetFilters on variation change omits setAttributes from dependency array. Line 104: useSelect omits taxonomyNames from dependency array.
issues.fix: Line 81: use functional update pattern or wrap setAttributes in useCallback. Line 104: add taxonomyNames to the useSelect dependency array (after ensuring VARIATION_TAXONOMIES[blockVariation] is memoized). Both are low-risk — omitting setAttributes is a common safe pattern since WordPress guarantees reference stability.
issues.note: These warnings existed before this revision and do not affect functionality.

issues.description: data-preset-filters outputs '[]' (empty JSON array) when presetFilters is empty, rather than '{}' (empty JSON object). WordPress internally converts the empty object attribute to an array in PHP ($presetFilters becomes [] instead of {}). The PHP normalizes this correctly via the is_array() check at line 110, so it has no functional impact. However, the data attribute is semantically inconsistent — it should be '{}' for an empty object.
issues.fix: Change line 213 to: data-preset-filters="<?php echo esc_attr( $preset_filters ? wp_json_encode( $preset_filters ) : '{}' ); ?>" — or, since $preset_filters is already an array at that point, use: empty( $preset_filters ) ? '{}' : wp_json_encode( $preset_filters ). The JS already handles both '{}' and '[]' via JSON.parse safely.
issues.note: No functional impact — JS JSON.parse handles both formats. Visual/API consistency issue only.

passedChecks: Build compiles without errors
Block registers correctly (takt/archive, apiVersion 3)
presetFilters attribute correctly defined in block.json
All 14 attributes have correct types and defaults
HTTP 200 on test page — no PHP fatal errors
Block wrapper renders correct CSS class
Block content is not empty across all 16 variations
No JavaScript console errors on page load
No horizontal overflow at any viewport width (375, 768, 1024, 1440px)
All images have alt text
Heading hierarchy is correct
Reduced motion handled by global theme handler
presetFilters narrows WP_Query results correctly (confirmed audience:students filter returns 1 resource)
displayFilters=false suppresses active filter bar even when presetFilters active
data-preset-filters JSON attribute output on section element
PHP pre-populates hidden inputs for preset filter values
JS buildButtons() called on DOMContentLoaded to show preset pills
Clear All resets to empty, not back to presets
loadFiltersFromUrl falls back to presets for popstate
blockVariation change clears presetFilters in editor
FormTokenField Preset Filters panel UI in editor
TSX/PHP sync confirmed — no $attributes[] extraction anti-pattern
PHP docblock has @var for all camelCase attributes including new $presetFilters
Test page validated: 16 instances, all in demo-containers, no stale markup, no placeholders
Load More working (section 13: Single Column, postsPerPage=3)
Empty optional fields variation renders gracefully without heading
Dark mode and light mode variants render correctly
All 5 post type variations render (post, team_member, resource, testimonial, policy)
